narrative:
Oxford Twp township has 805 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a modest Republican lean of 4.0 percentage points.
